channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 150 minutes of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity per week may reduce cardiovascular risk in overweight or obese adults
item.description: 1. In adults with overweight or obesity, performing at least 150 minutes of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity per week reduces cardiovascular ris...

item.description: Looking to add more protein to your meals? Explore high-protein foods, including affordable options, to help meet your daily needs.

item.title: Q&A: Prescription drug ads are everywhere. Is the 'ask your doctor' era over?

item.title: Shingles Vaccine Coverage Falls Short
item.description: Fewer than half of eligible adults have had the NHS shingles jab, with health leaders urging millions to book their vaccine. Press Association

item.title: CT-Quantified Plaque Volume May Predict CAD
item.description: Plaque burden predicts major adverse cardiac events, independent of other risk factors. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Resuscitation’s Ethical Dilemma: Rethink Epinephrine Use

item.title: Can Large Language Models Simplify Radiology Reports?

item.title: Seasonality likely to affect male fertility, study shows
